ddls:
CREATE TABLE "servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server */,
  "server_name" TEXT /* Name of the server */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the server */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the server (e.g., data center, cloud region) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the server (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the server's status was last updated */,
  "hardware_type" TEXT /* Type of hardware (e.g., physical, virtual, cloud) */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  "total_memory" INTEGER /* Total memory of the server */,
  "cpu_cores" INTEGER /* Number of CPU cores */,
  "disk_space" INTEGER /* Total disk space available */,
  "last_reboot" TEXT /* Last time the server was rebooted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server where the application is running */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the application was started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the application was stopped (if applicable) */,
  "memory_usage" INTEGER /* Current memory usage of the application */,
  "cpu_usage" INTEGER /* Current CPU usage of the application */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., running, stopped, restarting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_calls" (
  "call_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system call */,
  "call_name" TEXT /* Name of the system call */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the system call */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the system call (e.g., file, network, process) */,
  "criticality" TEXT /* Level of criticality (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "parent_call_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent system call (for hierarchical relationships) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last time the system call was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "call_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system call */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the metric */,
  "call_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the system call was made */,
  "duration_ms" REAL /* Duration of the system call in milliseconds */,
  "memory_usage" INTEGER /* Memory usage during the system call */,
  "cpu_usage" INTEGER /* CPU usage during the system call */,
  "io_usage" INTEGER /* I/O usage during the system call */,
  "context_switches" INTEGER /* Number of context switches during the system call */,
  "thread_count" INTEGER /* Number of threads involved in the system call */,
  "parent_call_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent system call (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_call_id FOREIGN KEY ("call_id") REFERENCES system_calls ("call_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_parent_call_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_call_id") REFERENCES system_calls ("call_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, developer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the access */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., high CPU usage, low memory) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold value that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., info, warning, critical) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of report generation (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "last_generated" TEXT /* Last time the report was generated */,
  "next_scheduled" TEXT /* Next scheduled time for report generation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_metrics" (
  "report_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report-metric link */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "metric_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the metric in the report (for prioritization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_metrics_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role is the default role for new users */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
